items.translated_title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children

items.translated_title: Cybersecurity vets protest ‘dangerous’ US government ban on Anthropic’s most powerful models
items.content: A group made up of dozens of cybersecurity experts urged the White House to remove export-control restrictions on Anthropic’s Fable and Mythos models, arguing that the order is going to limit the ability of cybersecurity defenders to secure their software and products.
